title: Kevin J. Anderson
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
{{Otheruses|Kevin}}
{{Person

'''Kevin James Anderson''' is a prolific science-fiction author and the author of ''[[Star Wars: The Jedi Academy Trilogy|The Jedi Academy Trilogy]]'' of books, which told the story of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] attempts to begin training [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]; and introduced characters such as [[Kyp Durron]] and [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Natasi Daala|Daala]]. He also co-wrote the ''[[Star Wars: Young Jedi Knights|Young Jedi Knights]]'' series with his wife, [[Rebecca Moesta]]. During the writing of his early ''Star Wars'' novels, he communicated with fans as a member of the [[FidoNet Star Wars Echo]].

Additionally, Anderson contributed to the [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi (comic series)|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi'']] comic series, and has written numerous short stories.
